REGISTER NOW
JOIN OUR TEAM
WHY WORK AT GLENVIEW

Do you have a passion for real estate, inspired home design, and making homeowner dreams come true? We love to hear from high-performing industry professionals who want to join a team on the cutting edge of new home building.

BROWSE CURRENT OPENINGS
COMPANY CULTURE AND VALUES

At Glenview Homes, we consciously work to foster a collaborative work environment where our team can grow and achieve together. We’re guided by five core values in everything we do.

Trustworthy

We deliver on our promises.

Welcoming

We offer personalized, friendly, one-on-one customer service.

Responsive & Reliable

We’re a small and nimble team that replies promptly to inquiries and needs.

Passionate

We love what we do, and our top priority is the homeowner experience.

Thoughtful

We truly care about our colleagues, the community and our homeowners.

WHAT WE HAVE TO OFFER
COMPETITIVE SALARIES & BENEFITS

We offer a competitive salary that’s aligned with experience and a comprehensive benefits package for all employees.

CONTINUOUS LEARNING
